channel.title: dotnet/efcore Pull Requests
channel.description: Pull Requests from https://github.com/dotnet/efcore, generated by https://github.com/meziantou/IssuesToRss/

item.title: PR: Fix the return type of OwnedNavigationBuilder.HasIndex - @AndriySvyryd
PR: Make CSharpRuntimeAnnotationCodeGenerator and friends internal - @AndriySvyryd
PR: Default relationships to ownership for Cosmos - @AndriySvyryd
item.description:
Allow to reconfigure STETs as regular entity types Rerun CosmosDiscriminatorConvention and BaseTypeDiscoveryConvention when ownership changes Keep OwnedNavigationBuilder.DependentEntityType up-to-day

Fixes #24803

item.title: PR: Switch from Apache to MIT license - @Pilchie
PR: Allow to toggle cross-table uniqueness for indexes and check constraints. - @AndriySvyryd
PR: minor cleanup for temporal table feature - @maumar
item.description:
• added some comments,
  • moved temporal query methods from queryable extensions to dbset extensions
  • added convention logic for case when initially non-temporal implicit many to many gets converted to temporal

item.title: PR: Rerun relationship discovery if an ambiguity has been resolved on the inverse - @AndriySvyryd
item.description:
Rerun KeyDiscoveryConvention when a property is ignored Remove the associated FK when a skip navigation is removed Add IForeignKeyNullNavigationSetConvention Sort IEntityTypeConfiguration applied from assembly

Fixes #18388 Fixes #24521

item.title: PR: [release/6.0-preview7] Add Migration Bundles - @bricelam
item.description:
This commit serves as a starting point for the Migrations Bundles feature. Getting it in now will enable users to start validating it in the next preview.

More refinement and automated testing to come...

Part of #19693

item.title: PR: Merging internal commits for release/3.1 - @vseanreesermsft
PR: Merging internal commits for release/5.0 - @vseanreesermsft
PR: Drop computed columns before non-computed - @roji
item.description:
• Made DropColumnOperation inherit from ColumnOperation. This was needed to distinguish between dropping computed and non-computed, but it makes sense to expose all column facets in case they matter somehow when dropping the column.
  • SQL Server and PostgreSQL don't allowing referencing a computed column from another computed column, Sqlite and MySQL do. In any case, we won't parse the computed SQL to understand dependencies.

Fixes #25237

item.title: PR: Draft: Add IServiceCollection.Use[DbProviderName]<DbContext> extension methods - @DamianEdwards
item.description:
WIP - Do not merge, for feedback only

Adds extension methods to enable simpler adding and configuration of contexts for a specific EF Core provider, e.g.:

var connectionString = builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection");
builder.Services.AddSqlite<ApplicationDbContext>(connectionString);

Contributes to #25192

Todo:

  • [x] Add Sqlite methods
  • [x] Add SQL Server methods
  • [ ] Add tests

item.title: PR: Translate Math.PI - @Marusyk
item.description:
Issue #25049

I've added a new member translator. I expected that it will run after this test

[ConditionalTheory]
[MemberData(nameof(IsAsyncData))]
public virtual Task Where_math_pi(bool async)
{
            return AssertQuery(
                async,
                ss => ss.Set<Product>()
                    .Where(od => Math.Abs(od.ProductID) > Math.PI),
                entryCount: 0);
}

Could you please suggest what I am doing wrong? It just translates Math.PI to constant without calling my translator. It seems I missed something

item.title: PR: Make ownership handling during model building more consistent - @AndriySvyryd
item.description:
• Store Owned configuration on EntityType
  • Add methods to IMutableModel and IConventionModel for creating owned entity types
  • Make sure ownerships have an associated principal to dependent navigation at all times
  • Store owned types in a field instead of an annotation

Fixes #25138
